title: allium karvounis
intro: Allium karvounis is a species of wild onion native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, derived from its sulfur compounds. The health benefits of Allium karvounis include its potential to reduce blood pressure, lower cholesterol levels, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in the form of herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used as a raw ingredient in various culinary dishes.
